src: The Gaze Correction Camera project is an advanced real-time gaze correction system designed to enhance video communication by improving eye contact. Leveraging state-of-the-art computer vision and deep learning techniques, this system dynamically adjusts the user's eye gaze direction during live video calls.
ja: 視線補正カメラプロジェクト — ビデオ通話中にリアルタイムで視線方向を補正し、アイコンタクトを改善する高度なシステム。最先端のコンピュータビジョンと深層学習技術を活用
